world.title: 'They are bold': Trump praises 'great ally' Israel after Iran tells him to 'block Bibi', then goes on to post 39 times in minutes
world.summary: Donald Trump praised Israel as a “courageous, bold, loyal, and smart” ally amid rising tensions with Iran, while criticizing NATO countries. This came after the Iranian embassy suggested he “block Bibi,” referring to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. Trump’s comments sparked reactions from various leaders, including Kamala Harris, who weighed in on the ongoing conflict between the nations.

world.title: Iran-Israel war LIVE: 'Bold and loyal', Trump praises Israel as 'great ally' of U.S.
world.summary: The ongoing conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the U.S. has escalated, particularly around the Strait of Hormuz. Naim Kassem of Hezbollah commented on a U.S. State Department document purportedly detailing a ceasefire agreement between Lebanon and Israel. Meanwhile, former President Trump praised Israel as a "great ally" of the U.S., emphasizing the importance of their relationship.

world.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump, Iran Cite Progress In Talks, Uncertainty Hangs Over Hormuz
world.summary: In the ongoing US-Iran conflict, two Indian-flagged vessels, Jag Arnav and Sanmar Herald, were fired upon by Iranian gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz, though no injuries or damage were reported. The war, now in its eighth week, has caused oil prices to rise due to the closure of this crucial shipping route. Peace talks continue amid uncertainty.

business.title: Roading SUV Launching Tomorrow! » MotorOctane
business.summary: The Toyota Fortuner, a leading SUV known for its reliability and resale value, will soon face competition with the launch of a new model. Details regarding pricing, features, design, and powertrain specifications will be revealed. The Fortuner has established itself as a status symbol among SUV enthusiasts, but the upcoming competitor aims to challenge its dominance in the segment.

business.title: 10 Sensex stocks with up to 45% upside potential. Are these in your portfolio?
business.summary: Analysts have identified ten Sensex stocks with potential upside gains ranging from 20% to 45% over the next year, according to Trendlyne data. These stocks are highlighted as promising opportunities for investors seeking strong returns in a selective market. The projected gains are based on average analyst target prices, serving as indicators for potential market rallies.

business.title: New Toyota Hilux Diesel Hybrid Launched in Europe - Price Euro 40k (Rs 44 L)
business.summary: Toyota has launched the new 9th-generation Hilux diesel hybrid in Europe, priced at €40,000 (approximately Rs 44 lakh). This model features the broadest powertrain lineup in its history, including internal combustion engines (ICE), diesel, diesel mild hybrid electric vehicle (MHEV), battery electric vehicle (BEV), and an upcoming hydrogen fuel cell (FCEV) option, enhancing its versatility.

technology.title: Apple Warns iPhone Users About Fake Calls and Text Alerts
technology.summary: Apple has issued a warning to iPhone users about an increase in scams involving fake calls and text alerts, particularly targeting Apple Pay. The company has shared a detailed list of signs to help users identify and avoid these fraudulent schemes. Users are encouraged to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions to protect their personal information and security.

technology.title: Only Convertible GT3 With 9000rpm Engine Explained
technology.summary: The Porsche 911 GT3 S/C features a 9000 rpm naturally aspirated engine, a manual-only gearbox, and an open-top design. This model aims to uphold the GT3 philosophy of being a focused, lightweight driver’s car, engineered with precision. The GT3 has historically adhered to a clear vision, prioritizing performance and driving experience over broader appeal.

technology.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro colours leak suggests Dark Cherry finish, light blue and grey options
technology.summary: Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro is expected to feature a new Dark Cherry finish, along with light blue and grey color options. Reports indicate that the device will include design refinements and minor updates. The launch is anticipated later this year, building on the previous iPhone 17 Pro's offerings while introducing fresh aesthetic choices for consumers.

sports.title: Caught on cam: Fan's 'black magic' act during SRH vs CSK match; Shivam Dube falls next ball - Watch
sports.summary: During the IPL 2026 match between Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings, a fan's unusual act, perceived as 'black magic,' drew attention. Shivam Dube, who scored 21 runs off 16 balls, was dismissed on the very next delivery, leading to speculation about the fan's influence. The incident sparked discussions about the existence and effectiveness of black magic in sports.

sports.title: Michael Carrick's job prospects, LinkedIn Liam Rosenior & Bruno Fernandes' Player of the Year bid - Winners and losers of Man Utd's massive win at Chelsea
sports.summary: Manchester United's significant victory over Chelsea highlighted various winners and losers, including Michael Carrick's job prospects and Liam Rosenior's LinkedIn presence. Bruno Fernandes emerged as a contender for Player of the Year, challenging the notion that the award should only go to players from title-winning teams. The match underscored individual performances within the context of team success in football.

sports.title: Humanoid robots race past humans in Beijing half-marathon, showing rapid advances
sports.summary: Humanoid robots demonstrated significant advancements in robotics by outperforming human runners in the Beijing half-marathon on April 19, 2026. Dozens of Chinese-made robots showcased their improving athleticism and autonomous navigation skills, highlighting the rapid progress in the sector. This event marks a notable milestone in the development of autonomous technology and its application in competitive sports.

health.title: Doctor reveals five simple food pairings to absorb more nutrients
health.summary: Dr. Amir Khan shared five food pairings that enhance nutrient absorption in an Instagram video. He highlighted combinations like tomatoes and olive oil, which improve lycopene absorption due to the fat content. These pairings not only support gut health but also maximize the benefits of everyday foods. Khan emphasized the importance of combining certain foods for better nutritional outcomes.

health.title: Rising pink eye cases spark antibiotic misuse warning
health.summary: Rising temperatures are leading to increased cases of conjunctivitis, or pink eye, prompting doctors to caution against ignoring symptoms or self-treatment. The seasonal surge is attributed to heat, humidity, dust, and the spread of infections. While most cases resolve independently, health professionals emphasize the importance of proper diagnosis and treatment to avoid complications and antibiotic misuse.

health.title: CRISPR Progress and Psychedelics in Spotlight Amid Biotech Surge
health.summary: Gerresheimer has rejected a takeover bid from Silgan, halting negotiations. Researchers are making strides with CRISPR technology for Down syndrome, while Eli Lilly's obesity pill gains traction. Trump advocates for psychedelic therapies, and U.S. HIV aid remains stable despite testing declines. Biotech stocks, including Alamar Biosciences and Kailera Therapeutics, surged following their Nasdaq debuts.

science.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on April 19
science.summary: On April 19, the Moon is in the Waxing Crescent phase, gradually reappearing after several days of darkness. Each night, it will become more illuminated from the right side as it approaches the Full Moon. This phase marks the beginning of the Moon's visibility increase, providing a clearer view for observers in the coming nights.

science.title: Scientists Unearth 430,000-Year-Old Wooden Tools in Greece, Rewriting Evolutionary Timeline
science.summary: Scientists have discovered wooden tools dating back 430,000 years at the Marathousa 1 site in Greece. This finding, published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, reveals early human craftsmanship and suggests that technological innovation occurred much earlier than previously thought. The research contributes significantly to understanding human evolution and the development of tool-making skills.

science.title: NASA launches CANVAS CubeSat to study lightning’s impact on space weather
science.summary: NASA has launched the CANVAS CubeSat, a 4U satellite now in low Earth orbit, to study the effects of lightning on space weather. The mission will track very-low-frequency radio waves produced by lightning and ground-based transmitters. CANVAS stands for Climatology of Anthropogenic and Natural VLF wave Activity in Space, aiming to enhance understanding of near-Earth environments.

entertainment.title: Mahavatar Parashuraam Announced: Vishnu’s Fiercest Avatar to Hit Screens in December 2027
entertainment.summary: The animated film "Mahavatar Narsimha," produced by Hombale Films, achieved significant global box office success, marking the launch of the Mahavatar Cinematic Universe. Following this, the announcement of "Mahavatar Parashuraam," featuring Vishnu’s fiercest avatar, has generated excitement. The film is scheduled for release in December 2027, adding to the anticipation surrounding future projects in the franchise.

entertainment.title: Darshan Kumar passes away at 70; Mika Singh shares heartfelt tribute
entertainment.summary: Darshan Kumar, the younger brother of T-Series founder Gulshan Kumar, passed away on April 18, 2026, in Delhi at the age of 70. His death follows the recent loss of renowned musical maestro Asha Bhosle. Musician Mika Singh shared a heartfelt tribute, honoring Kumar's contributions to the music industry and expressing condolences to his family and friends.

entertainment.title: Who is Miss India 2026 winner? Things to know about Goa's Sadhvi Satish Sail, from her journey to her dreams
entertainment.summary: Sadhvi Satish Sail from Goa was crowned Miss India 2026 at the finale held on April 18, 2026, at the Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. This event marked the 61st edition of the Miss India pageant. Details about her interests, aspirations, and journey to the title have been highlighted following her victory.
